cutoutSuffix: Matte gray mannequin subject centered on neutral mid-gray seamless studio backdrop. Soft even studio lighting, no cast shadows on floor. Photographic film-school reference still. Centered for compositing. Zero typography.

male.prompt: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Medium shot waist up ONLY: bottom edge cuts exactly at belt line — NO trousers below belt. Facing camera, arms at sides. Smooth sculpted gray dress shirt, belt at waist.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin face from the reference. Extreme close-up ONLY: both eyes and brow fill the entire frame, cropped extremely tight. Frame cuts above hairline and below nose bridge. No shirt, no collar.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity from the reference. Close-up framing ONLY: face and hair from top of hair to chin, tight portrait — no torso. Tiny sliver of gray shirt collar at bottom edge at most.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Medium close-up chest up, arms at sides. Smooth hard-surface gray dress shirt sculpt, collar and button placket.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Close shot chest up, slightly tighter than medium close-up.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Cowboy shot framed from mid-thigh up. Gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt. No holster.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Medium wide shot from knees up.

Matte gray male display mannequin full body head to toe, facing camera, arms at sides. Full shot: entire standing body fills 90% of frame height. Gray dress shirt, pants, belt, shoes — unified gray sculpt.
Use the exact same full-length matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Extreme long shot: same mannequin small in frame with generous empty space around figure.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Very long shot: figure even smaller, vast empty space.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. General view wide shot with subject small in environment.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin face from the reference. Big close-up: forehead to chin, tighter than standard close-up.
Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin from the reference. Choker shot: very tight close-up cutting at neck or above eyebrows.

female.prompt: Matte gray female display mannequin with sculpted facial features, clean bob hairstyle. Sculpted blouse with collar, sculpted skirt, unified gray hard-surface sculpt. Medium shot waist up, facing camera, arms at sides.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin face from the reference. Extreme close-up: eyes and brow fill frame.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Close-up face and hair to chin.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Medium close-up chest up.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Close shot chest up.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Cowboy shot mid-thigh up.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Medium wide knees up.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Full body head to toe full shot.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Extreme long shot, small figure in frame.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Very long shot, tiny figure.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. General view wide.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin face from the reference. Big close-up forehead to chin.
Use the exact same matte gray female mannequin from the reference. Choker shot very tight.

ots.prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot. Foreground: back and shoulder of first matte gray male mannequin in gray dress shirt, soft blur. Facing camera: second distinct matte gray male mannequin, medium shot waist up, facing camera.
Over-the-shoulder shot. Foreground: male mannequin shoulder blur. Facing camera: matte gray female mannequin in blouse, medium shot waist up.
Over-the-shoulder shot. Foreground: female mannequin shoulder blur. Facing camera: matte gray male mannequin, medium shot waist up.
